messages.content: I can answer questions, open apps or websites, generate images, play music, write content, and search for information. I can also schedule reminders and save important memories for you.
can you speak in tamil or hindi
I can speak in Tamil. நான் தமிழில் பேச முடியும்.
हाँ, मैं हिंदी भी बोल सकता हूँ।
I can understand Telugu, but my responses will be in English.
My primary language model is English, so while I can understand Telugu, I'm better at responding in English.
